3248880.name: Canary
3248880.description:
You're awake! By law, you've been awakened in order to assess the current viability of this planet. If you complete the prescribed tasks and survive 180 local days, the main switchboard will be instructed to awaken the rest of the population. If you fail, another canary will be awakened in 10 local years to attempt to succeed where you have failed.

Canary is a top-down Rogue-like with multiple procedurally generated dungeons, turn-based combat, and pixel-perfect graphics.

  • NPCs to help you on your way

  • Computer terminals to hack

  • Secret passages

  • Faction-based encounters 

  • Highly varied weapons and armor

  • Exit saves and event-based saves
